top_signals.title: Gold Climbs Above $4,000 as Inflation Print Curbs Rate-Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: Gold extended gains above $4,000 an ounce on Friday after the latest US inflation print tempered expectations for an interest-rate hike, capping a tumultuous week that saw bullion slump to the lowest price since November.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Stocks Edge Up at End of Jittery Wall Street Week: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street is wrapping up a chaotic week with mild gains in stocks amid intense volatility in high-profile technology names, which is testing investors’ nerves after a torrid run from war-fueled lows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US stocks on track to break losing streak despite falls in chipmakers
top_signals.summary: Software stocks led a recovery in the Nasdaq Composite after early losses
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia, Alphabet sit out megacap tech bounce as chip stocks sink
top_signals.summary: SoftBank Group plunged, leading a broad selloff in Asian technology stocks amid mounting concerns over the rising cost of AI infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: REalloys raises $100M via institutional placement
top_signals.summary: The $100 million share offering, expected to close on June 26, would provide working capital moving forward, the company said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: i-80 Gold terminates Vox Royalty offtake with $4.8M payment
top_signals.summary: i-80 said it is expected to realize cash flow savings through 2028.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: 101st soldiers use drones to drop grappling hooks, breach razor wire
top_signals.summary: The Army should treat drones like ammo, one officer said, estimating a brigade needs between 1,000 to 1,500 drones per week in sustained combat operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump threatens 100% tariff on countries putting 'Digital Services Tax on American Companies'
top_signals.summary: "This TARIFF will supersede Trade Deals made with the Country, whether implemented, signed, or not," Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.

top_signals.title: Remarks by Commissioner Jørgensen at the press conference of the Energy Council
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Luxembourg, 26 Jun 2026 
Thank you very much and let me start by congratulating the Presidency on your hard work and the very impressive results that you have managed to achieve.
